hpi: 77 yo M with CAD (EF 20%), HTN, A-fib on coumadin presents after two falls. Reports generalized weakness for 2-3 days. Day prior to admission fell walking to bathroom, no injury. Day of admission fell again after a few steps ('legs gave out'), left leg pain, unable to get up. On floor for 4 hours before found. Denies CP, lightheadedness, SOB, palpitations, LOC.

ed_course.cxr: Right mid lung base opacity - ? pneumonia vs atelectasis
ed_course.cta_chest: No PE. RUL airspace opacity - ? PNA or atelectasis
ed_course.ct_head: Atrophy, prior right frontal stroke, no acute process
ed_course.bp_drop: SBP dropped to 90/45 from 105/63, given 1L NS bolus

timeline.events: Admitted to ED after fall. Hip and foot fractures identified. Mildly hypoxic. CTA negative for PE. Started on levofloxacin. BP drop in ED.
Hematocrits stable (initial drop likely dehydration). Cleared for OR. Overnight: triggered for SBP 89, temp 101.9. Fluid bolus given.

ORIF left femur. Received 2u FFP + 2u PRBC. Post-extubation: unresponsive in PACU, A-fib with RVR 130-140s, respiratory distress (ABG 7.12/89/114). REINTUBATED. SBP dropped to 80s. L IJ cordis placed. Stat echo: severely depressed LVEF, old septal akinesis. Transferred to MICU with SBP in 60s, temp 103F.

Started levophed. SWAN-GANZ CATHETER PLACED via L IJ cordis. Hemodynamics: SVR 700, CVP 14, Wedge 18, SV 69, CO 4.5-6.5. Diagnosis: SEPTIC SHOCK (not cardiogenic). 4L NS + 1u PRBC given (Hct 27, mixed venous O2 61%). Levophed weaned off overnight. Cortisol stim test normal.
Mental status greatly improved. Extubated without complication. Weaned to PS 5/5 prior.
Transferred to floor. Hemodynamically stable, afebrile.

Weaned to 2L O2 but desatted to 88% with crackles at bases. Lasix restarted. Metoprolol restarted and uptitrated. Low-dose ACE restarted. Ecchymosis noted on left foot, XR confirmed 5th metatarsal fracture.
Discharged to extended care facility. On 2L O2, satting well. Oriented x3. Antibiotics: levofloxacin + flagyl to complete 10-day course.
